title: 9 Herbal Creams For Upper Abdominal Pain
description: Cinchona officinalis creams contains a compound called quinine, which has been used to help alleviate upper abdominal pain. Quinine has anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce swelling and pain in the abdominal area. The alkaloids present in Cinchona officinalis, including quinine, cinchonine, and cinchonidine, have a spasmolytic effect, meaning they can relax the muscles and prevent cramping.
